shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' | head -80 && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- header references ---\\n' && rg -n \"renderCustomHeader|CalendarHeader|monthHeader|monthsShown\" src test* 2>/dev/null | head -160"

/bin/bash -lc 'rg -n "previousMonthButtonLabel|forceShowMonthNavigation|monthsShown|showPreviousMonths" src/index.tsx | head -80 && rg -n "react-datepicker__header|month-container|day-names" src/stylesheets src | head -100'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,150p' src/month.tsx && rg -n \"renderPreviousButton\\(|renderNextButton\\(\" src/calendar.tsx && rg -n \"showMonthYearDropdown\" src/calendar.tsx | head -30"
/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba src/calendar.tsx | sed -n '800,925p' && nl -ba src/calendar.tsx | sed -n '470,575p' && git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"render(Year|Month|MonthYear)Dropdown\\(\" src/calendar.tsx && yarn prettier --check src/calendar.tsx src/month.tsx src/index.tsx && yarn tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json"
/bin/bash -lc "git diff --stat && git diff -- src/month.tsx | tail -80 && printf '\\n--- package scripts ---\\n' && node -e 'console.log(require(\"./package.json\").scripts)'"
/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/prettier --check src/calendar.tsx src/month.tsx src/index.tsx && yarn tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && git diff --check && git diff --stat'
/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/prettier --write src/calendar.tsx && yarn tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && git diff --check && git diff --stat'

/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/jest src/test/calendar_test.test.tsx --runInBand --silent >/tmp/react-datepicker-calendar-jest.log && tail -12 /tmp/react-datepicker-calendar-jest.log && git diff --check && git status --short'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
